meanings.definition: a youth subculture that appeared first in England in the late 1960s as a working-class reaction to the hippies; hair was cropped close to the scalp; wore work-shirts and short jeans (supported by suspenders) and heavy red boots; involved in attacks against Asians and football hooliganism
a young person who belongs to a British or American group that shave their heads and gather at rock concerts or engage in white supremacist demonstrations
